creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
Please, perform a repocopy of cad/gnetlist to cad/geda-netlist,
	for this project is actually belongs to gEDA suite.
	This project is not very usable without other geda programs, and
	geda-netlist describe it better, than gnetlist. Furthermore, other
	geda ports use geda- prefix contradictory to this port.
